name: Shareable read-only route links
description: Generate a signed, time-limited link to a single route that an unauthenticated viewer can use to watch video and see the map. No write access. The URL carries a signed token (HMAC-SHA256 over route_id + expiry using SESSION_SECRET). A new public page renders a stripped-down read-only view of the route.
acceptance_criteria: POST /v1/routes/:dongle_id/:route_name/share with body { expires_in_hours: int (default 72, max 720) } returns { url: "https://<host>/share/<token>", token, expires_at } -- requires an authenticated session
Token format: base64url(JSON({route_id, exp})) || '.' || base64url(hmac); verified on read via constant-time comparison
GET /v1/share/:token returns route + segment list + geometry + HLS playlist URLs scoped to that route and no other -- no auth required, but token must validate and not be expired

Signed-URL generation for HLS segments: the share handler re-signs /upload/ or a new /share-media/:token/:path endpoint that validates the token and streams the file. Do NOT leak the generic /v1/route/ endpoint contents for other routes
web/src/app/share/[token]/page.tsx renders a read-only player + map using the shared endpoints; no nav chrome, no login redirect on 401
When SESSION_SECRET is unset, POST returns 501 Not Implemented (no secret to sign with)
Backend tests cover: create + consume happy path, expired token rejection, tampered token rejection, cross-route media access denied
pnpm --dir web lint, type-check, build pass
